title: View health dashboards for a registered collector

blocks.content: In this milestone, you use a collector's internal metrics to identify issues and make decisions about scaling based on resource usage. Fleet Management displays dashboards based on Alloy Health metrics in the application interface.
To view health dashboards for a registered collector, complete the following steps:
Search, filter, or sort to find the unhealthy collector in your **Inventory**.
Click the collector to open the details view.
Use the dashboard selector to switch between **Collector**, **Resources**, **Remote Configuration**, **Prometheus Components**, and **Cluster Node** dashboards.
If the Alloy Health integration is installed, use **Dashboards** to open the integration dashboard.

Fleet Management provides dashboards for collector health, resource usage, remote configuration load health, Prometheus components, and cluster node metrics.

In the next milestone, you view logs associated with a collector.

---

### Troubleshooting

Explore the following troubleshooting topics if you need help:

- [Health dashboards have no data](/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/fleet-management/set-up/onboard-collectors/onboard-troubleshooting/#health-dashboards-have-no-data)
